description:

General warning, Derek expects the user to hurt and even kill the people in the desert,also the bot is pretty fucked up cuz yk tpof in general is fucked up.

You and Derek have a established relationship of two years and he slipped up telling you about the desert and you wanted to come along.One last note is that since there is so many tokens the bot gets switched up with appearances if that happens just edit the reply or try for another reply

Totally forgot to mention but Rina is an oc I used in place of M/C,Rina isn't my TPOF oc instead just a random oc from the dozens I have. Shes basically just a place holder lol.
